headline: Company Presentation
subheadline: Proudly representing Czech aerospace engineering, avionics, and mission systems integration.
cta: AIR TEAM – YOUR MISSION. OUR TECHNOLOGY.

headline: We are AIR TEAM.
body:
AIR TEAM holding is a leading European specialist in avionics, ISR (Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance), and mission systems integration. Our core business in aero upgrades and cabin solutions is complemented by full-service support for key accounts, authorized maintenance, and global parts supply via our e-shop.

Operating under EASA Part 145 & Part 21J / 21G & FAA Repair Station with integrated International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) compliance, AIR TEAM combines engineering excellence with a strong European logistics and distribution network.

headline: A holding built around aircraft that have to fly.
subheadline: Mission systems, engineering, MRO, and supply under one roof.

hoverCards.label: Mission
hoverCards.body: ISR systems, mission architecture, and airborne intelligence programs for government and defense customers.

hoverCards.label: Engineering
hoverCards.body: Full-aircraft upgrade solutions. Outdated components replaced with modern systems that improve form, function, and operational capability.

hoverCards.label: MRO
hoverCards.body: Aircraft maintenance, repairs, component overhauls, and hangar installations.

hoverCards.label: Supply
hoverCards.body: Aviation support and logistics for OEMs, government clients, defense primes, and B2B/B2C customers — pilot equipment, avionics, parts, and consumables through partnerships built on quality.

headline: Our strength is one connected holding.

cards.body: Aerospace parts distribution and e-commerce. Garmin, Bose, Collins, BendixKing, L3Harris.

cards.body: Defense and ISR integration. EO/IR, mission systems, C-UAS, and airborne SIGINT.

cards.body: From Smart Supply through Service & CRO, Engineering, Intel, and Interiors, covering the entire aircraft upgrade and support lifecycle.

cards.title: Export-Driven Growth & Strategic Focus
cards.body: Clear path to more than 80% export revenue and more than 70M EUR turnover by 2030, with EMEA, selected Asian regions, and NATO/EU defense programs.

headline: Proof in the work. Discipline in the crew.
body: We are the AIR TEAM crew — pilots, technicians, avionics specialists, and people from the field. In aviation, impressions do not hold. Preparation does. Precision does. AIR TEAM is a holding built on field experience: avionics integration, certified upgrades, aircraft service, and solutions for operations and special missions.

cards.title: Certified capability
cards.body: Part 145, Part 21J DOA, Part 21G POA, FAA Repair Station, NATO AQAP 2110, MAA CZ.

cards.title: Full lifecycle coverage
cards.body: Mission integration, engineering, certification, MRO, component repair, and supply.

cards.title: Fast supply chain
cards.body: 90% of EU orders delivered within 48 hours.

hoverCards.label: RADAR
hoverCards.body: Facts, data, and early signal detection.

hoverCards.body: Work that holds up in operation, audit, and customer handover.

hoverCards.body: Every new solution must be safer, faster, or more precise.

hoverCards.label: FREQUENCY

headline: Thank you for your attention.
body: Our mission is to empower pilots, operators, and governments to fly safer, smarter, and further – combining data, engineering excellence, and reliable logistics.
cta: AIR TEAM – YOUR MISSION. OUR TECHNOLOGY.
